item.title: MORSED
item.description:
A free morse code translation application, allowing the user to translate from free text to morse code and morse code to free text as well. The ability to share translation on other applications.

Release Notes

Version 2.6.1

This release brings in vibration translations, allowing you to translate your text to morsed vibrations, it also includes Norwegian to the list of languages.

16 Sep 2022

Version 2.6.0

This release has some minor fixes as well as adding German to the list of languages.

15 May 2022

Version 2.5.0

In this update, I have made changes to the onboarding screens to make it easier to navigate. I have also added symbols into the translatable characters.

13 April 2022

Version 2.3.0

Changed the over all design of the app Logo change, Fixed a few minor bugs relating to audio translations, Added sectioning to the guide book to divide Letters and Numbers.

25 October 2021

Version 2.2.1

I've added some behind the scenes bug fixes and performance enhancements.

2 September 2021

Version 2.2.0

I've added some behind the scenes work to make things a bit cleaner as well as changing the design slightly.

13 July 2021

Version 2.1.2

This new version includes some performance and translation updates to keep the app running smoothly.

19 June 2021

Version 2.1.1

-Small Fixes Relating To App Start Up and Small Fixes Relating To Translations

3 June 2021

Version 2.1.0

Logo Changes, UI Changes, Start Up Screen, Ability To Translate To Audio

1 June 2021

Version 2.0.1

Fixed issue with certain characters and numbers not translating. Added Dutch to the selectable languages. Small UI Changes.

14 Apr 2021

Version 1.10.1

In this version I have added support for the following languages / English / Thai / Mandarin Chinese / Hindi / Spanish / French

17 Nov 2020

Version 1.9.3

This release contains bug fixes as well as push notification integration.

29 Jun 2020

Version Version 1.9.2

A New Tabbed Layout, Bug Fixes ,Colour Change

31 May 2020

Version 1.8.1

This version includes "Audio Morsed" allowing users to type a message and have the translated morse code played back to them, this feature had been requested in reviews multiple times and is only the first addition with Audio Morsed.

30 March 2020

Version 1.7.2

I've cleaned up some bugs as well as adding support for emojis. You can now replace those dots and dashes with emojis to add that extra layer of amusement to your Morsed conversations.

28 Feb 2020

Version 1.6.1

I've cleared up the UI so that it follows suit throughout the app. Removed the Dark Mode switch originally added and integrated Native Dark Mode. Fixed a few issues within the iMessage Extensions not auto translating on selection.

16 Feb 2020

Version 1.5.2

Fixed a few issues with translation sometimes missing letters. Implemented new iMessage functionality, this allows users to send Morsed messages directly from the messages application.

8 Feb 2020

Version 1.4.1

In this version I've added a new "Morse Code Guide" allowing users to see all characters side by side translations.

4 Jan 2020

Version 1.3.1

In this version, numerical translations have been added as well as some minor bug fixes.

6 Dec 2019

Version 1.3.0

This version contains a total redesign of the app, including dark mode. The ability to share translations over other apps is now live allowing you to use your messages in WhatsApp, Facebook Messenger and more. The biggest improvement within this release is the size of the application from the previous 66mb

7 Nov 2019

Version 1.0.1

Initial App Release

21 June 2019

item.title: Todaily
item.description:
A Swift iOS ToDo list app allowing the user to create projects and tasks and monitor the progress on each one.

Release Notes

Version 2.6.0

Categorised Emojis List, Ability To Change Project Emojis, Private Projects (Lock Projects Behind A Passworded Screen)

May 4, 2021

Version 2.5.1

UI Fixes For Dark Mode, Edit Mode For Projects

Apr 27, 2021

Version 2.5.0

You can now customise your projects even more by adding emojis as project icons

Apr 21, 2021

Version 2.4.0

Ability To Complete Tasks, Ability To Undo Completion Of Tasks, Swipe Actions On Tasks ,See Incomplete tasks count on homepage

Apr 15, 2021

Version 2.3.0

This release allows you to add updates and comments to your tasks. This release also resolves some issues relating to adding projects.

Mar 31, 2021

Version 2.2.2

Small Fixes Projects and Small Fixes Tasks.

Mar 25, 2021

Version 2.2.1

Create projects for your tasks so you can monitor the progression of a project.

Mar 24, 2021

Version 2.1

Fixed some issues with older devices ,Fixed some issues with text not showing correctly.

Feb 1, 2021

Version 2.0

Need More Info? - Tasks Now Have Descriptions, Need To Know What You Added Last? - Tasks Can Now Be Sorted By Date, Got A Task That You Will Never Do? - You Can Now Archive Tasks, Scrapping Your Entire Todo List? - You Can Now Clear All

Jan 16, 2021

Version 1.0

Initial Upload

Jan 10, 2021

item.title: Spell That For Me
item.description:
Have you ever been on your phone to say the bank and they ask you “Can you spell that for me”. You automatically try to come up with words that match the letters in say your name or address. Not any more with Spell that for me you can save your common phrases and then open while in a call to get the phonetics when required.

Release Notes

Version 1.2.0

Navigation Changes (The app is cleaner to navigate), Audio Playback (You can now play audio of output)

Feb 20, 2021

Version 1.0.0

Initial App Release

Nov 24, 2020

item.title: AR Monsters
item.description:
A Small POC I’ve made using pokemon cards as image placeholders to add in 3d pokemon models.

I plan to later on implement health bars and showing the pokemon’s attacks as pressable buttons.

item.title: App Icon Generator
item.description:
Have you ever needed to convert your app icons to the correct sizes and just dont have the time to do so, this mac app allows you to convert images into the the correct sizes

This mac application allows you to drag and drop your app icons into the window and have ipad and iphone automatically create the correct sizes.
